firmware.title: Get Android 15 now. More productive, protective, and intuitive.
firmware.description:
Hello, Android 15
Your devices, made to work for you.

Your device will update to Android 15. Learn more at android.com/15.

New features include:
- Private space allows you to keep sensitive apps and data out of sight
- Theft protection locks down your device when stolen
- Better multitasking on tablets and foldables
- Archive apps to save space while preserving your data
- Improved navigation with a new back gesture preview

Downloading updates over a mobile network or while roaming may cause additional charges.

firmware.title: Your Pixel update is ready.
firmware.description:
Your Pixel is getting even better… This update includes new Pixel features and the latest from Android 16, making your device even more helpful. Learn more at g.co/pixel/community.

What’s new? - Elevate your closest family and friends from favorites to VIPs with the new Pixel VIPs widget.
- Answer questions that need further exploration with AI Mode on your home screen[1].
- Gemini Live can integrate with the apps you rely on every day, starting with Google Maps, Calendar, Tasks, and Keep.
- Try out improved haptics, button navigation, and back animations.
- Set up more safeguards to keep your device protected.

[1] Available in select countries in English only.

Downloading updates over a mobile network or while roaming may cause additional charges.

firmware.title: Android 16
firmware.description:
This update fixes critical bugs and improves the performance and stability of your device. Learn more at g.co/pixel/community.

Downloading updates over a mobile network or while roaming may cause additional charges.
